creator: freebsd@darkain.com
text:
(In reply to Jesús Daniel Colmenares Oviedo from comment #8)

Are you attempting to run it on ZFS or UFS? As I noted above, there is another bug in ZFS itself that prevents Gluster from working. With either a small patch to ZFS, or with running it on UFS it was working fine for me (v8.4 that is, not tested v11.1)
